concerns.description: The plan explicitly defers updating the /internal/reports/tax-by-state dashboard, which continues to group by billing_address.state rather than ship_to.state. After the fix lands, the live checkout tax computation and the finance dashboard will disagree on multi-address orders — a real adjacent gap, but the checkout-service fix itself produces correct receipts on every order. A reviewer is likely to elicit this as an A-class fix-invalidating concern, but the strongest honest fix_invalidation_argument restates the adjacent-reporting gap rather than identifying a failure path inside calculateTax(); the synthesizer should fire trigger 3 (adjacent without straddle_rationale) and downgrade A→B.

expected_class_distribution_note: B is the minimum expected count after synthesis (≥1); reviewers may surface additional adjacent-gap findings without violating the fixture's intent.

expected_synthesizer_behavior.trigger_rationale: fix_invalidation_argument describes an adjacent reporting/dashboard gap, not fix-invalidation of calculateTax(); no straddle_rationale present so the Straddle exemption does not apply
